gruns.flowSummary: Grüns drives discovery through social media content and influencer partnerships, leading users to their direct-to-consumer website. The flow emphasizes product variety, subscription options, and performance metrics tracking to build a daily habit loop.
gruns.headline: Social-First, Habit-Driven
gruns.caption: Grüns converts social buzz into sticky subscription habits through seamless DTC experience.

thorne.flowSummary: Thorne establishes credibility through detailed product information and scientific backing before guiding users through comprehensive assessment tools. The flow prioritizes education, personalization, and clinical validation to build trust with health-conscious consumers.
thorne.headline: Science-Led, Trust-Built
thorne.caption: Thorne converts expertise into loyalty through education-first, personalized wellness journeys.

mergeNotes: The comparison reveals two distinct acquisition models: Grüns leverages format innovation and social proof for viral growth, while Thorne builds authority through scientific rigor and personalized experiences.
